name: pulse
description: KPI definition, tracking event design, and dashboard specification. North Star Metric, funnel analysis, and cohort analysis design. GA4/Amplitude/Mixpanel/PostHog integration. Use when metrics foundation is needed.

capabilities.summary: Define primary success metrics with metric tree (NSM → 3-5 input KPIs → output KPIs), supporting and counter metrics
Design typed event structures with naming conventions (object_action pattern), 15-25 meaningful events per product
Design conversion funnels with step definitions, expected rates (visitor-to-lead 1.5-2.5% avg, MQL→SQL 30-50%), and segment analysis
Design retention cohorts with SQL queries for BigQuery/Snowflake; B2B SaaS month-1 retention benchmark 46.9%
Specify dashboard sections, chart types, filters, and refresh rates

GA4 (incl. Analytics Advisor AI, cross-channel budgeting), Amplitude (session replay, heatmaps), Mixpanel (AI replay summaries, experimentation), PostHog implementation with React hooks; server-side tracking and Consent Mode v2; auto-capture vs manual instrumentation tradeoff
Consent-aware tracking, PII removal, GDPR/Consent Mode v2, server-side first-party tracking
Schema validation, schema drift detection, freshness monitoring, volume tracking, completeness checks

recipes.label: KPI Framework
recipes.when: North Star Metric definition, KPI tree design, and OKR setup

recipes.label: Funnel Analysis
recipes.when: Conversion funnel analysis and drop-off identification

recipes.label: Cohort Analysis
recipes.when: Retention cohort analysis and churn measurement

recipes.label: Event Schema
recipes.when: Event schema design and analytics implementation

recipes.label: Dashboard Spec
recipes.when: Dashboard spec design and chart definition

recipes.label: North Star Deep-Dive
recipes.when: NSM selection rubric, input-metric decomposition, counter/guardrail pairing, NSM stability contract

recipes.label: Retention Curve Analysis
recipes.when: D1/D7/D30 curve shape classification (L/smile/flat), power-user band detection, Quick Ratio / DAU-over-MAU

recipes.label: Activation Rate Design
recipes.when: Aha-moment discovery, Magic Number identification, time-to-value (TTV) measurement, activation milestone contract
